canCancel.title: Can Cancel
canCancel.description: True if the order can still be cancelled (not yet shipped).

canReturn.title: Can Return
canReturn.description: True if the order is eligible for return (delivered).

caseNumber.title: Case Number
caseNumber.description: The closed service Case created by this lookup. Use this as proof the interaction was logged.

found.title: Found
found.description: True if an order was found.

fulfillmentStatus.title: Fulfillment Status
fulfillmentStatus.description: Not Shipped / Processing / Shipped / In Transit / Out for Delivery / Delivered / Returned / Cancelled / Refunded.

orderNumber.title: Order Number
orderNumber.description: The customer-facing WooCommerce order number to quote back to the shopper, for example #506. Never replace this with the Salesforce internal auto-number.

summary.title: Summary
summary.description: A friendly summary of the order status.
